Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Namespace Agibuild.Fulora.Shell

Classes

AvaloniaHostCapabilityProvider

Avalonia-based implementation of IWebViewHostCapabilityProvider that binds tray and menu operations to Avalonia TrayIcon and NativeMenu controls. Non-tray/menu operations are delegated to an inner provider.

AvaloniaThemeProvider

Avalonia-based IPlatformThemeProvider that detects dark/light mode via Avalonia.Application.ActualThemeVariant and dispatches change events. Accent color and high-contrast are delegated to platform-specific detection.

AvaloniaWindowChromeProvider

Avalonia-based IWindowChromeProvider that manages window transparency, custom chrome drag regions, and appearance for one or more tracked Avalonia windows.

DeepLinkActivationEnvelope

Canonical deep-link activation envelope normalized from platform-specific payloads.

DeepLinkActivationIngressResult

Result of attempting to ingest a deep-link activation.

DeepLinkAdmissionDecision

Policy decision for deep-link activation admission.

DeepLinkDiagnosticEventArgs

Structured diagnostic event for deep-link registration and activation lifecycle.

DeepLinkPlatformEntryDescriptor

Describes a platform's deep-link activation entry mapping.

DeepLinkPlatformEntrypoint

Static helper for platform entrypoints to ingest deep-link activation into IDeepLinkRegistrationService.

DeepLinkRegistrationResult

Result of a deep-link route registration attempt.

DeepLinkRegistrationService

Default implementation of IDeepLinkRegistrationService. Provides route registration, URI normalization, policy admission, idempotency enforcement, and dispatch to WebViewShellActivationCoordinator.

DeepLinkRouteDeclaration

Declaration of a supported deep-link scheme and route pattern for an app identity.

DelegateCommandPolicy

Command policy that delegates decision logic to host callback.

DelegateDevToolsPolicy

DevTools policy that delegates decision logic to host callback.

DelegateDownloadPolicy

Download policy that delegates handling to a host callback.

DelegateMenuPruningPolicy

Menu pruning policy that delegates decision logic to host callback.

DelegateNewWindowPolicy

New-window policy that delegates handling to a host-provided callback.

DelegatePermissionPolicy

Permission policy that delegates handling to a host callback.

DelegateSessionPermissionProfileResolver

Delegate-based session-permission profile resolver.

DelegateSessionPolicy

Session policy that delegates resolution to a host callback.

FallbackThemeProvider

Fallback IPlatformThemeProvider that returns safe defaults. Used on platforms where OS theme APIs are unavailable (e.g., headless, unsupported Linux variants).

GlobalShortcutPlatformProviderFactory

Factory selecting the correct IGlobalShortcutPlatformProvider for the current platform.

IsolatedSessionPolicy

Session policy that always resolves to an isolated scope.

MenuInteractionEventArgs

Event args for menu item interaction events.

NavigateInPlaceNewWindowPolicy

New-window policy that preserves the v1 fallback behavior (navigate in-place when unhandled).

NullGlobalShortcutProvider

No-op provider for platforms that do not support global shortcuts (Wayland, mobile, etc.).

SharedSessionPolicy

Session policy that always resolves to a shared scope.

SharpHookGlobalShortcutProvider

Cross-platform global shortcut provider using SharpHook (libuiohook). Supports Windows, macOS (requires Accessibility permission), and Linux X11. The hook is started lazily on first registration and stopped on last unregistration/dispose.

ThemeService

Bridge service implementation that exposes OS theme information to JavaScript. Uses IPlatformThemeProvider for OS-specific detection and BridgeEvent<T> for push-based theme change notifications.

TrayInteractionEventArgs

Event args for tray interaction events.

WebViewFileDialogResult

Result of file dialog operations.

WebViewHostCapabilityBridge

Runtime host capability bridge with policy-first deterministic execution semantics.

WebViewHostCapabilityBridgeOptions

Options for host capability bridge boundary validation.

WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<T>

Typed result envelope for host capability calls.

WebViewHostCapabilityDiagnosticEventArgs

Structured diagnostic payload for a completed host capability call.

WebViewHostCapabilityDiagnosticExportRecord

Stable export payload for host capability diagnostics.

WebViewManagedWindowCreateContext

Input payload for creating a managed shell window.

WebViewManagedWindowLifecycleEventArgs

Lifecycle event payload for managed windows.

WebViewMenuItemModel

Typed menu item model.

WebViewMenuModelRequest

Typed menu model payload for host app-shell integration.

WebViewMenuPruningDecision

Decision returned by IWebViewShellMenuPruningPolicy.

WebViewMenuPruningPolicyContext

Context for menu pruning policy evaluation.

WebViewNewWindowPolicyContext

Context for new-window policy evaluation.

WebViewNewWindowStrategyDecision

Strategy decision returned by IWebViewNewWindowPolicy.

WebViewNotificationRequest

Request payload for host notification.

WebViewOpenFileDialogRequest

Request payload for open-file dialog.

WebViewSaveFileDialogRequest

Request payload for save-file dialog.

WebViewSessionPermissionProfile

Resolved profile model that governs session and permission behavior.

WebViewSessionPermissionProfileContext

Input context for resolving session-permission profiles.

WebViewSessionPermissionProfileDiagnosticEventArgs

Diagnostic payload for session-permission profile evaluation.

WebViewShellActivationCoordinator

Deterministic in-process single-instance activation coordinator.

WebViewShellActivationForwardResult

Forward result for activation dispatch.

WebViewShellActivationRegistration

Registration handle returned by Register(string, Func<WebViewShellActivationRequest, CancellationToken, Task>).

WebViewShellActivationRequest

Activation request payload forwarded from secondary instance to current primary owner.

WebViewShellCommandDecision

Decision returned by IWebViewShellCommandPolicy.

WebViewShellCommandPolicyContext

Context for shell command policy evaluation.

WebViewShellDevToolsDecision

Decision returned by IWebViewShellDevToolsPolicy.

WebViewShellDevToolsPolicyContext

Context for DevTools policy evaluation.

WebViewShellExperience

Opt-in runtime helper that wires common host policies (new window, downloads, permissions) onto an IWebView instance.

WebViewShellExperienceOptions

Options for WebViewShellExperience. All features are opt-in.

WebViewShellPolicyErrorEventArgs

Error payload raised when a shell policy handler fails.

WebViewShellSessionContext

Input context for resolving shell session policy.

WebViewShellSessionDecision

Session resolution result produced by IWebViewShellSessionPolicy.

WebViewSystemActionRequest

Typed request payload for host system action execution.

WebViewSystemIntegrationEventRequest

Typed inbound system integration event payload.

WebViewTrayStateRequest

Typed tray state payload for host app-shell integration.

WindowChromeTrackingOptions

Options for tracking a window under the chrome provider.

WindowShellService

Framework-level shell-window service. Manages global appearance settings (theme, transparency, chrome metrics) across all tracked windows. Designed as an app-level singleton shared across multiple WebViews via Bridge.Expose<IWindowShellService>().

Structs

WebViewHostCapabilityDecision

Authorization decision for a capability request.

WebViewHostCapabilityRequestContext

Request context for host capability authorization.

WebViewPermissionProfileDecision

Typed permission decision under profile governance.

Interfaces

IDeepLinkAdmissionPolicy

Policy interface for deep-link activation admission.

IDeepLinkRegistrationService

Host-facing service for deep-link route registration and native activation ingress.

ITrayIconResolver

Resolves a tray icon path to an Avalonia Avalonia.Controls.WindowIcon.

IWebViewDownloadPolicy

Policy for handling DownloadRequested.

IWebViewHostCapabilityPolicy

Host capability authorization policy.

IWebViewHostCapabilityProvider

Host capability provider implementation.

IWebViewNewWindowPolicy

Policy for handling NewWindowRequested in a host-controlled way.

IWebViewPermissionPolicy

Policy for handling PermissionRequested.

IWebViewSessionPermissionProfileResolver

Resolver for session-permission profile.

IWebViewShellCommandPolicy

Policy for governing command execution in shell experience.

IWebViewShellDevToolsPolicy

Policy for governing DevTools operations in shell experience.

IWebViewShellMenuPruningPolicy

Policy for pruning menu model state in shell governance pipeline.

IWebViewShellSessionPolicy

Policy for resolving shell session scope.

Enums

DeepLinkActivationIngressStatus

Status of a deep-link activation ingress attempt.

DeepLinkActivationSource

Source of a deep-link activation event.

DeepLinkDiagnosticEventType

Diagnostic event type for deep-link activation lifecycle.

DeepLinkPlatformSupport

Platform support status for deep-link native registration.

DeepLinkRegistrationStatus

Status of a deep-link registration validation.

WebViewHostCapabilityCallOutcome

Deterministic outcome model for host capability calls.

WebViewHostCapabilityDecisionKind

Authorization decision kind for a capability request.

WebViewHostCapabilityOperation

Typed host capability operations available through the shell bridge.

WebViewManagedWindowLifecycleState

Lifecycle states for runtime-managed windows.

WebViewNewWindowStrategy

Strategy result for handling a new-window request.

WebViewShellActivationForwardStatus

Forward status for secondary-instance activation dispatch.

WebViewShellDevToolsAction

DevTools operation kinds governed by shell policy.

WebViewShellPolicyDomain

Shell policy execution domains.

WebViewShellSessionScope

Session scope used by shell policy.

WebViewSystemAction

Supported typed system actions.

WebViewSystemIntegrationEventKind

Typed system integration event kinds emitted from host to web pipeline.

Agibuild.Fulora — Cross-platform Hybrid App Framework
